code_change: No runtime behavior changed. This iteration adds runtime/code evidence explaining why rowchunk1 is not equivalent to the append+context interleaving fallback.

commands.direct_interleaved_green: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_hidden_bisect.py --batch-size 2 --decode-tokens 16 --max-layers 40 --layer-limits 8 --batch-decode-full-attn-kv-append-path per_row --batch-decode-attn-context-path per_row --batch-decode-attn-append-context-order interleaved --json /tmp/hipengine-hidden-bisect-iter410-L8-c2-direct-interleaved-green-atol4e-3-focus1269.json
commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
commands.rowchunk1_interleave_flags_red: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_hidden_bisect.py --batch-size 2 --decode-tokens 16 --max-layers 40 --layer-limits 8 --batch-decode-full-attn-row-chunk-size 1 --batch-decode-full-attn-kv-append-path per_row --batch-decode-attn-context-path per_row --batch-decode-attn-append-context-order interleaved --json /tmp/hipengine-hidden-bisect-iter410-L8-c2-rowchunk1-interleave-flags-red-atol4e-3-focus1269.json

conclusion: Direct retained-default append+context interleaving is hidden/token green at L8, but adding the same per-row append/context flags under rowchunk1 is token-green/hidden-red. Code evidence explains the distinction: the rowchunk branch slices each chunk to tokens=1, then calls the batch decode layer; in `run_full_attention_moe_decode_batch_layer_fp16`, the per-row append+context interleave branch is guarded by `tokens > 1`, so rowchunk1 falls through to the batch append/context path with rows=1 rather than the slot-cache per-row append followed immediately by per-row context/gate. Thus the next runtime target is a true row-local append+context ordering path (or batch kernel equivalent) before batch O/post/MoE, not rowchunk1 alone.

prompt_verifier.evidence: PASS: focused C2.3 full-attention blocker evidence advanced with a fresh green direct append/context interleaving artifact plus a red rowchunk1+same-flags contrast and code evidence for the call-order distinction. This is runtime evidence needed for the next native fix; no retained throughput/scaling claim is made.
